pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: 2 Large rock formations in a small cloud, all waves spawn around or behind this area.  Warp in is around 50k away below and in front.
NOTE: All waves aggress upon spawning, unless greater than 120km away.  Aggro can be managed this way if you accidentally blow a trigger.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Auto-aggro from each wave.  Last ship in each waves triggers next wave.  All waves spawn at the Drone Bunker, 22km from warp-in.

pockets.heading: Blitz:
lines: Kill all ships in Group 4 and all spawns.
Note: This only works as a blitz in that it makes the Cosmic Anomaly despawn so you will have to be probed for a neutral to warp to you.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: To lower the damage kill all but one ship in each of the 4 initial spawns then work on 1 group at a time.
Matriarch Alvus hit mainly Therm, while Alvus Queen hit EM/Ex; prioritize kills according to your tank.
If you have an extra 20gj/s cap stability it is not necessary to kill the neuting tower.
Bounty: ~27-32mil isk depending on spawn composition
On warp-in all sentry guns and the lone rat will agro within a few seconds.
With the new Odyssey rat AI, rats will target switch to your drones intermittently.

pockets.heading: Spawn 3 (See Note)
lines: Note: After eight runs of this the determining factor of the spawn is still unknown, but 80% of the time it is the leftmost Nuker/Disintegrator Alvum.

pockets.heading: Tips:
lines: Matriarch Alvus hit mainly Therm, while Alvus Queen hit EM/Ex; prioritize kills according to your tank.
Bounty: ~27-28.5mil isk depending on spawn composition
